reason: The diff clearly delivers the stated intent by adding cache checks for openapi router fixtures through multiple mechanisms: (1) a new GitHub workflow step that verifies committed test fixtures are up-to-date, (2) a `.gitignore` entry for the cache directory, (3) renaming router files to `.router.ts` and fixture files to `.openapi.json` for clarity, (4) implementing a hash-based caching system in the codegen script that tracks input file changes and skips regeneration when inputs haven't changed, and (5) updating test file references and vitest config to
